title: elatostema laevigatum
intro: Elatostema laevigatum, also known as the Smooth Elatostema, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Elatostema laevigatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in the form of essential oils and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
